choices.name: chcSkipActualsandForecast
choices.choiceText: Skip adding Actuals and Forecast and submit draft Update (you can add these up to the due date).

Flow.description: To enable the details of advance forecasts to be created against a funding award as a manual process
Flow.label: DESNZ - Create Advance Monthly Forecasts

fields.name: Choose_Baseline_Display
fields.fieldText:

{!Get_Award.Name}

Monthly Update due: {!Get_Award.Next_Reporting_Date__c}﻿

{!Get_Award.Name}

fields.name: Confirmation_Display
fields.fieldText:

{!Get_Award.Name}

{!rcdBaseline.Baseline_Version__c}



Forecast Period: {!rcdForecast.Forecast_Start_Date__c} - {!rcdForecast.Forecast_End_Date__c}

fields.name: Forecast_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Forecast
